Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface IVariantUsedInfo

All Superinterfaces:
ISCState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
VariantUsedInfo
public interface IVariantUsedInfo extends ISCState
State component telling whether a variant is required in the current machine being checked.
Since:
3.4

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final IStateType<IVariantUsedInfo>
    STATE_TYPE
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isTrue()
    Returns whether the machine uses a variant, that is whether it contains any event which convergence needs to be proved.
    void
    set(boolean used)
    Sets whether the current machine uses a variant.

  • Field Details

    • STATE_TYPE

      static final IStateType<IVariantUsedInfo> STATE_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • isTrue

      boolean isTrue() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns whether the machine uses a variant, that is whether it contains any event which convergence needs to be proved.
      Returns:
      true iff the machine needs a valid variant
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this state component is mutable

    • set

      void set(boolean used) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Sets whether the current machine uses a variant.
      Parameters:
      used - whether the variant is needed
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this state component is immutable
